title: Senior Director, Functional Applications & IT Quality
raw_jd:
About the job

Location: Remote (US)

Company: VB Spine

Looking for a career where your work truly matters? At VB Spine, you’ll be part of a mission-focused team that supports surgeons during life-changing spinal procedures. We’re looking for driven individuals ready to learn quickly, adapt under pressure, and grow in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.

The Senior Director, Functional Applications & IT Quality will lead VB Spine’s global portfolio of functional business applications supporting R&D, Regulatory, Quality, HR, Finance, Legal, Communications, and Marketing, while also establishing and maturing the company’s IT Quality and IT Compliance capabilities.

Reporting to the Chief Information & Digital Strategy Officer, this role will be responsible for ensuring these business-critical platforms are aligned to functional priorities, supported effectively, and operated in a manner consistent with regulatory, compliance, and quality expectations. The role is especially important in a med-tech environment where business applications and IT controls must support product development, quality systems, regulatory requirements, and enterprise compliance. This role aligns to the current org design spanning R&D, Regulatory & Quality IT; HR, Finance, Legal, Comm/Marketing applications; and IT Quality / IT Compliance. 

What You’ll Do

Functional Application Leadership

    Lead the strategy, support, enhancement, and lifecycle management of functional applications supporting R&D, Regulatory, Quality, HR, Finance, Legal, Communications, and Marketing.
    Partner directly with business leaders to identify priorities, define roadmaps, and improve the fit-for-purpose use of applications within each functional domain.
    Drive application rationalization and alignment across functions to reduce complexity and improve business supportability.

R&D, Regulatory, and Quality Systems

    Oversee technology solutions that support R&D, product development, regulatory affairs, and quality operations.
    Ensure these systems are configured, maintained, and enhanced in accordance with business requirements and applicable compliance obligations.
    Partner with R&D, Quality, and Regulatory leaders to ensure business systems support design controls, product lifecycle requirements, documentation management, complaint handling, CAPA, and other critical processes where applicable.

Corporate Functional Systems

    Oversee the application portfolio for HR, Finance, Legal, Communications, and Marketing.
    Ensure systems supporting these functions are integrated appropriately with enterprise platforms and aligned to evolving business needs.
    Support process maturity, workflow automation, reporting, and operational efficiency within corporate functions.

IT Quality & IT Compliance

    Establish and lead VB Spine’s IT Quality and IT Compliance program in partnership with Quality, Cybersecurity, Infrastructure, and enterprise application teams.
    Define and maintain policies, standards, procedures, and controls for IT compliance in regulated and business-critical systems.
    Support computer system validation/qualification approaches, change control, documentation rigor, audit readiness, and evidence management as applicable.
    Partner with internal and external stakeholders to support audits, assessments, and remediation efforts related to IT-supported systems.

Team Leadership & Cross-Functional Partnership

    Lead and develop a team of managers, leads, analysts, and external partners supporting functional applications and IT quality.
    Establish a strong service-oriented and quality-driven operating model.
    Drive close partnership with business stakeholders so that IT is viewed as a value-added enabler rather than a transactional support function.

What You Bring

    Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, Quality, Regulatory Affairs, Business, or related field required.
    Master’s degree preferred.
    Training or certifications in quality systems, compliance, validation, regulated systems, or IT service management preferred.
    Familiarity with frameworks and practices related to GxP, computer system validation, risk management, and regulated technology environments is preferred.
    Experience with enterprise business applications and workflow platforms across multiple corporate functions is desirable.
    15+ years of progressive experience leading business applications, functional systems, or regulated technology portfolios.
    7+ years in a leadership role with responsibility for teams, vendors, and cross-functional delivery.
    Proven experience supporting applications in regulated environments, ideally in medical device, life sciences, healthcare, or similarly controlled industries.
    Strong understanding of functional processes across one or more of the following areas: Quality, Regulatory, R&D, HR, Finance, Legal, Communications, or Marketing.
    Experience with IT Quality, IT Compliance, validation, or audit-readiness programs strongly preferred.
    Demonstrated ability to partner with business executives and functional leaders to define requirements, prioritize investments, and improve operational effectiveness.
    Strong documentation, governance, and control mindset balanced with practical business execution.
    Experience managing external vendors and service providers.
    Ability to lead in a dynamic carve-out, stand-up, or transformation environment.

Why VB Spine?

We believe in growing talent from within. At VB Spine, you’ll get the training, mentorship, and support you need to build a strong foundation in the medical sales field. You’ll work alongside a high-performing team, gain valuable operating room experience, and take your first step toward a rewarding and meaningful career.

Compensation

Pay for this role is competitive and based on experience, with qualifications and performance taken into account.

VB Spine reserves the right to offer compensation outside of this listed range. Final compensation is determined on a case-by-case basis and considers a variety of factors, including experience level, skillset, and market conditions.

Benefits Include

    Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance 
    401(k) with company match 
    Paid time off (PTO) and holidays 
    Ongoing training and professional development opportunities 
    Opportunity to grow within a fast-paced, dynamic company

Benefits found in job post

Vision insurance, 401(k)

score.skills_rationale: Strong alignment with candidate's enterprise BI, data architecture, and systems integration experience. The role requires oversight of functional applications across R&D, Finance, HR which matches candidate's ERP modernization, Workday implementation, and cross-functional analytics background. IT Quality/Compliance aspects align with candidate's government clearance and enterprise governance experience.
score.scope_rationale: Perfect match for candidate's senior leadership level. Role requires 15+ years experience and 7+ leadership years, which aligns with candidate's progression from individual contributor to architect/director level. The cross-functional business partnership and team leadership expectations match candidate's experience reporting to CFOs and leading enterprise initiatives.
score.pay_rationale: No compensation range provided in JD, making pay alignment assessment impossible. Only states 'competitive and based on experience' without specific figures.
score.raw_analysis: This is a senior W2 director role at a medical device company that strongly matches the candidate's technical skills and leadership experience. The role combines enterprise application management, IT governance, and cross-functional business partnership - all areas where the candidate has demonstrated expertise. The medical device regulatory requirements represent a learning curve but the core IT architecture and business systems experience translates well. Without salary information, this would be worth pursuing to understand compensation expectations.

cover_letters.content:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the Senior Director, Functional Applications & IT Quality position at VB Spine. With 25+ years of hands-on experience leading enterprise applications and data architecture across regulated environments, I bring the exact combination of functional systems leadership and compliance rigor your medical device organization requires. My current role architecting data systems for the VA's $2.6B Financial Management Business Transformation demonstrates my ability to deliver mission-critical applications under strict regulatory oversight while partnering directly with finance, HR, and executive stakeholders.

My track record directly aligns with VB Spine's needs across all key domains. At Howard University, I served as one of three cross-functional drivers for a multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation, coordinating across Finance, HR, and IT during executive disruption to deliver enterprise systems supporting all corporate functions. I established comprehensive data governance policies, built enterprise BI architectures, and partnered with the Deputy CFO on analytics frameworks—experience that translates directly to your requirements for HR, Finance, and cross-functional application leadership. My current VA work involves integrating complex legacy systems with modern ERP platforms while maintaining audit readiness and data validation standards essential in regulated environments.

What sets me apart is my proven ability to bridge technical delivery with business outcomes under pressure. I've designed resilient data pipelines, led teams through system transitions, and consistently stepped in hands-on to resolve complex integration challenges. My CISSP certification and extensive government contracting experience demonstrate the security and compliance mindset crucial for medical device IT quality programs. At VitalSpring, I identified process bottlenecks through analytics that saved $70K+ in under six months—the type of operational efficiency improvement your corporate functions require.

I am confident my combination of enterprise application leadership, regulatory environment experience, and hands-on technical expertise positions me to establish VB Spine's IT Quality program while driving functional application strategy across your global portfolio. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my proven track record can support your mission of enabling life-changing spinal procedures.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Dear Hiring Manager,

VB Spine's need for a Senior Director of Functional Applications & IT Quality presents a fascinating challenge: establishing robust IT governance and compliance capabilities while supporting critical business functions across a medical device organization. Having led enterprise application portfolios and IT governance initiatives in highly regulated environments, I understand the complexity of balancing regulatory requirements with operational efficiency. My experience architecting data systems for the Department of Veterans Affairs' $2B+ ERP modernization and stabilizing Howard University's multi-million-dollar Workday implementation has taught me how to navigate the intersection of compliance, technology, and business needs that VB Spine requires.

The parallels between your challenges and my recent work are striking. At VA's Financial Management Business Transformation, I designed enterprise data pipelines and reconciliation systems that had to meet strict audit requirements while supporting real-time financial operations—much like the regulated systems VB Spine needs for R&D, Quality, and Regulatory functions. During Howard University's Workday implementation, I served as one of three cross-functional drivers during a period of executive disruption, helping stabilize delivery and establish data governance policies that improved system reliability and audit readiness. This experience of working across Finance, HR, and IT stakeholders while maintaining compliance rigor directly translates to VB Spine's need for someone who can partner with business leaders while ensuring systems meet medical device regulatory standards.

What excites me about this role is the opportunity to build VB Spine's IT Quality and Compliance program from the ground up. My background includes establishing data governance frameworks, implementing validation processes, and designing audit-ready architectures—capabilities that would be essential for developing your computer system validation approaches and change control processes. Additionally, my hands-on technical leadership style, combined with experience mentoring cross-functional teams, aligns well with your need for someone who can lead both technical teams and business partnerships. I'm particularly drawn to VB Spine's mission-focused environment, where the technology decisions we make directly support life-changing spinal procedures.

I'd welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience building compliant, business-aligned technology solutions could help VB Spine establish the robust IT foundation needed to support your critical mission. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Subject: Senior Director, Functional Applications & IT Quality Application

Dear Hiring Manager,

I'm writing to express my interest in the Senior Director, Functional Applications & IT Quality position at VB Spine. With 25+ years leading enterprise applications and data architecture across regulated environments, I bring the exact combination of technical leadership and cross-functional business partnership your role requires. At the Department of Veterans Affairs, I currently lead data architecture for a large-scale ERP modernization, designing enterprise reporting systems and establishing data validation processes that ensure audit readiness. My previous role at Howard University involved driving a multi-million-dollar Workday implementation as one of three cross-functional leaders spanning Finance, HR, and IT—directly paralleling your need to oversee applications across R&D, Quality, Finance, and corporate functions.

Your emphasis on IT Quality and compliance capabilities aligns perfectly with my background establishing data governance initiatives, designing audit-ready architectures, and coordinating across stakeholders to meet regulatory requirements. I've consistently bridged the gap between technical systems and business needs, transforming IT from a transactional function into a strategic enabler. My CISSP certification and government clearance work demonstrate the documentation rigor and control mindset essential for medical device environments, while my hands-on technical approach ensures I can dive deep when complex integration challenges arise.

Best regards,
Salil Maniktahla

tailored_resume:
SALIL MANIKTAHLA
Springfield, VA  ·  571-215-8218  ·  salil.maniktahla@gmail.com  ·  linkedin.com/in/salilmaniktahla

SUMMARY
Senior technology leader with 25+ years of experience leading functional business applications, IT quality, and enterprise systems across finance, HR, regulatory, and operational domains. Currently directing data architecture and reporting for the Department of Veterans Affairs' Financial Management Business Transformation program, managing complex ERP integrations and regulatory compliance requirements. Proven track record of establishing IT governance frameworks, leading cross-functional application portfolios, and partnering with business executives to align technology investments with organizational priorities. Experienced in regulated environments with government security clearances and enterprise compliance programs.

CORE CAPABILITIES
Functional Application Leadership
    • End-to-end application portfolio management across Finance, HR, R&D, and regulatory domains
    • Business application strategy, roadmapping, and lifecycle management
    • Cross-functional stakeholder partnership and requirements definition

IT Quality & Compliance
    • IT governance framework development and policy establishment
    • Audit readiness, documentation management, and control implementation
    • Computer system validation and change control processes

Enterprise Systems Integration
    • ERP implementation and integration (Workday, iFAMS, legacy systems)
    • Data pipelines, system integration, and platform rationalization
    • Application portfolio optimization and complexity reduction

Leadership & Partnership
    • Team leadership across technical and business functions
    • Executive partnership and business-IT alignment
    • Vendor management and external service provider oversight

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Data & Analytics Architect (Contractor)
U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs – FMBT	Sep 2021 – Present
    • Lead functional application strategy and systems integration for VA's enterprise Financial Management Business Transformation program, supporting finance, acquisition, and regulatory compliance functions
    • Oversee technology solutions supporting regulatory affairs and quality operations, ensuring systems meet government compliance obligations and audit readiness standards
    • Partner directly with business leaders across finance and acquisition functions to define roadmaps and improve fit-for-purpose use of enterprise applications
    • Establish and maintain policies, standards, and controls for IT compliance in regulated and business-critical systems
    • Drive application rationalization and integration across multiple legacy and modernized platforms to reduce complexity and improve business supportability
    • Lead cross-functional delivery coordination across finance, IT, and regulatory stakeholders

Business Intelligence Analyst – Finance
Howard University	Apr 2020 – Jul 2024
    • Served as key technology leader in multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation, leading functional application strategy across Finance and HR domains during executive transition period
    • Established and led Data Governance initiative, defining policies, standards, and implementation strategy for enterprise data management
    • Partnered directly with CFO and Deputy CFO to align business application portfolio with organizational priorities and regulatory requirements
    • Led application lifecycle management for enterprise BI and financial systems, ensuring audit readiness and compliance documentation
    • Designed and implemented enterprise application architecture supporting finance, HR, and operational functions
    • Drove process maturity, workflow automation, and operational efficiency improvements within corporate functions

BI Partner / Strategist (Independent Consultant)
Multiple Clients	Jul 2016 – Mar 2020
    • Led functional application deployments and IT quality programs across multiple regulated and enterprise environments
    • Established service-oriented operating models and quality-driven practices for business application support
    • Managed external vendors and service providers supporting enterprise application portfolios
    • Defined and maintained documentation standards, change control processes, and audit readiness procedures
    • Mentored technical teams and supported cross-functional delivery in dynamic transformation environments

Co-Founder / CEO & Technical Director
Urban Evolution	Apr 2010 – Apr 2020
    • Led enterprise application strategy across HR, Finance, Operations, and Marketing functions for multi-location business
    • Established IT governance frameworks, policies, and operational controls supporting business-critical systems
    • Managed application portfolio lifecycle including system rationalization, integration, and vendor management
    • Drove business-IT alignment through direct partnership with functional leaders and operational stakeholders

VitalSpring Technologies
BI Senior Manager	May 2008 – Jul 2016
    • Product Manager for enterprise BI and analytics applications supporting healthcare supply chain operations
    • Led cross-functional teams delivering functional applications aligned with business requirements and compliance obligations
    • Established change control processes and documentation standards supporting regulated technology environments
    • Drove application enhancement and lifecycle management initiatives, delivering $70K+ in operational savings

EARLIER EXPERIENCE

Senior BI Consultant – Claraview (Teradata), 2006–2008
    • Technical architect for 25,000-user enterprise application platform (Lowe's); established governance frameworks and operational controls

IT Specialist – U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, 2002–2005
    • Led team of 6 supporting functional applications for regulatory and environmental compliance operations
    • Defined IT strategy and application roadmaps for National Center for Environmental Economics
    • Maintained Public Trust security clearance and supported government audit requirements

Operations Manager – MicroStrategy, 1999–2001
    • Led engineering teams supporting enterprise analytics applications and business intelligence platforms
    • Established vendor management processes and service provider oversight, achieving $312K annual savings

SELECTED SYSTEMS & INNOVATION
    • Designed enterprise application architecture combining functional systems, workflow automation, and compliance monitoring
    • Built integrated platforms supporting cross-functional business processes with audit logging and documentation management
    • Established IT governance frameworks for regulated environments with role-based access and change control
    • Operate advanced technical infrastructure supporting enterprise application development and testing environments

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Enterprise Applications: ERP systems (Workday, iFAMS), Business Intelligence platforms, Workflow automation
Data & Integration: SQL, Python, ETL/ELT, Data Modeling, System Integration, API development
IT Governance: Change control, Documentation management, Audit readiness, Compliance frameworks
Infrastructure: Linux, Docker, Enterprise networking, Distributed systems, Cloud platforms (Azure)
Quality & Validation: Data validation, System testing, Process documentation, Risk management

CERTIFICATIONS & EDUCATION
B.A., Washington University in St. Louis
CISSP  ·  Certified Scrum Master  ·  Tableau Certified Professional  ·  MicroStrategy Certified Developer
